steps.prompt: Flop: your bucket is draw and equity is live. Choose action.
steps.why_v1: A draw bucket can keep pressure while still having outs.
steps.feedback_correct_v1: Correct. Draw bucket identified for this chain step.
steps.feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. With live equity and enough outs to keep pressuring later streets, this flop starts from the draw bucket rather than a made-hand label.

steps.prompt: Turn: pressure spot continues. Choose action.
steps.why_v1: Raise applies pressure when the turn keeps your leverage.
steps.feedback_correct_v1: Correct. Raise fits this turn pressure step.
steps.feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. When the turn keeps your leverage intact, this pressure line should continue with a raise instead of backing off.
